//: House style for the plurid engine monorepo (Phase E, 2026-06-20). Tuned to match the existing source (4-space, single quotes, semicolons, trailing commas everywhere) so `pnpm format` reflows as little as possible. Note: Prettier does NOT understand the `// #region` block convention used throughout — it leaves comments alone, so the regions survive, but run `format` per-file on what you touch rather than across the whole tree at once.
